summary: A Go-based monolithic project utilizing an AI agent orchestration system (GOrchestra) to heavily generate and extend its test suite, centered around a test runner, schema validation, and MCP integrations.
concerns: highly fragmented test generation via AI agents (many isolated glm-agents directories)
potential test redundancy or overlap across multiple agent-generated test files
deeply nested synthetic directory structure adding complexity
suggestions: consolidate and deduplicate the numerous agent-generated extra test files
evaluate the maintainability of the GOrchestra agent workflow
ensure core logic in runner.go and handlers.go has sufficient permanent human-authored tests
